subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad-Qablí-'Alí! The heaven hath turned towards thee, and the sun hath spoken thy praise from a station adorned with lights [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد قبل علی ان السماء اقبلت الیک و الشمس نطقت بذکرک فی مقام تزین بانوار
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @praise and encouragement
